mapper.sql: c.id, c.course_code, c.course_name, c.dept_id, d.dept_name, c.teacher_id, t.teacher_name, c.credit, c.course_type, c.semester, c.status, c.remark, c.created_by, c.updated_by
mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.course_code, c.course_name, c.dept_id, d.dept_name, c.teacher_id, t.teacher_name, c.credit, c.course_type, c.semester, c.status, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_attachment ba WHERE ba.deleted = 0 AND ba.biz_type = 'course' AND ba.biz_id = c.id ) AS attachment_count FROM biz_course c LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.id = c.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN biz_teacher t ON t.id = c.teacher_id AND t.deleted = 0 WHERE
ORDER BY c.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_course c WHERE

SELECT
FROM biz_course c LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.id = c.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN biz_teacher t ON t.id = c.teacher_id AND t.deleted = 0 WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM biz_course c LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.id = c.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN biz_teacher t ON t.id = c.teacher_id AND t.deleted = 0 WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM biz_course c LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON d.id = c.dept_id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN biz_teacher t ON t.id = c.teacher_id AND t.deleted = 0 WHERE c.course_code = #{courseCode} AND c.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT c.id, c.course_code, c.course_name FROM biz_course c WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.course_name ASC, c.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_course ( course_code, course_name, dept_id, teacher_id, credit, course_type, semester, status, remark, created_by, updated_by, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{courseCode}, #{courseName}, #{deptId}, #{teacherId}, #{credit}, #{courseType}, #{semester}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_course SET course_code = #{courseCode}, course_name = #{courseName}, dept_id = #{deptId}, teacher_id = #{teacherId}, credit = #{credit}, course_type = #{courseType}, semester = #{semester}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_course SET deleted = 1, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
